name: Market Monitor Dev Container
postCreateCommand: git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-autosuggestions.git ${ZSH_CUSTOM:-~/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions && git clone https://github.com/zsh-users/zsh-syntax-highlighting.git ${ZSH_CUSTOM:-~/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting && sed -i 's/plugins=(git)/plugins=(git zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting)/' ~/.zshrc
